verdict: CLEAN SPLIT — with length held constant by CEM (d_len -0.020, n=116), register alone discriminates at 0.725 CI[0.624,0.807]. Confirms the shipped caveat with a clean number. Single seed/generator; CEM subsample underpowered (report CI).
